hero.heading: Watch together. Chat together.
hero.sub: A minimal starting point for a WatchTogether-like platform: rooms, playlist, chat.

chat.banned_message: You have been banned from this room.
chat.signin_hint: Sign in to participate in chat.

homepage.description: Create a private or public room and share moments together.
homepage.enter_code_desc: Type the code shared with you to join.
homepage.access_desc: Join immediately if the code is valid.
homepage.mode_desc: Guests watch, users can fully interact.
homepage.mobile_friendly_desc: WatchWithMe works perfectly on your phone. Create rooms, watch videos, and chat with friends on the go!

roomCreate.title: Create a room
roomCreate.subtitle: Name your room and optionally set a password to make it private.
roomCreate.error_password_short: Password must be at least 3 characters
roomCreate.name_helper: Choose a descriptive name so others can find your room.
roomCreate.public_description: Rooms without a password are open to everyone and appear in the public list.
roomCreate.privacy_description: Private rooms require a password to join and are not listed publicly.
roomCreate.password_helper: Password must be at least 3 characters.

settings.username_helper: This name will be displayed in chat and rooms.
settings.email_helper: Your email address is used for account-related notifications.

invite.title: Join Room
invite.desc: Join the room « {{roomName}} » to watch videos together!
invite.linkdescription: Share this link directly with your friends so they can join.
invite.email.description: Enter your friend's email. They will receive an invitation.

legal_modal.title: Legal notice
legal_modal.project_type_value: Academic, non-commercial project developed for the AMS course at the University of Avignon.
legal_modal.supervisors_value: Mr. Ludovic Bonnefoy & Mr. Rémy Kessler
legal_modal.prototype_notice: WatchWithMe is an educational prototype. It is not intended for commercial use and no data is monetized.

terms_modal.title: Terms of Use
terms_modal.intro: By using WatchWithMe, users agree to the following Terms of Use.
terms_modal.section_1_text: Users must provide a valid email address and password. Passwords are automatically hashed by Supabase.
terms_modal.section_2_text: Users can create public or private rooms, join rooms via a link, and watch synchronized videos. The room creator becomes the moderator and may manage the playlist, roles, and remove users if necessary.
terms_modal.section_3_text: Users must remain respectful. Illegal, offensive, or discriminatory messages are not allowed. Moderators may delete messages or remove users from the room.
terms_modal.section_4_text: WatchWithMe is an experimental academic project. No guarantee is provided regarding uptime or service stability. Users are responsible for the YouTube links they add.
terms_modal.section_5_text: Administrators or supervisors may suspend accounts or rooms in case of misuse.

privacy_modal.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_modal.section_1_text: WatchWithMe may collect the following data: email, username, avatar, chat messages, playlists, and room activity.
privacy_modal.section_2_text: Data is used only to enable: authentication, room management, chat, video synchronization, and general platform functionality.
privacy_modal.section_3_text: Data is stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL). Passwords are hashed and Row Level Security (RLS) rules protect sensitive data. All connections use HTTPS.
privacy_modal.section_4_text: Users may request account deletion or modification of their personal data at any time.
privacy_modal.section_5_text: The platform may use technical cookies for session handling and language settings.
privacy_modal.section_6_text: This platform is a student project developed for educational purposes. It is not intended for commercial use.
